stag_tine_pendant.name: Stag-Tine Pendant
stag_tine_pendant.flavor: Carved from the Pallid Stag's antlers. The wood remembers being a man.

reapers_coin.name: Reaper's Coin
reapers_coin.flavor: Pried from a weir-keeper's tongue. He bit down on it as the flood came.

hollowed_locket.name: Hollowed Locket
hollowed_locket.flavor: The Mourncross magistrate's locket. Empty — the portrait long worn through.

mourners_knot.name: Mourner's Knot
mourners_knot.flavor: A cord knotted forty-two times — once for each gate sealed against the holds.

smiths_band.name: Smith's Band
smiths_band.flavor: Red Beard's, half-melted from the heat of the last anvil he ever struck.

bonesong_ring.name: Bonesong Ring
bonesong_ring.flavor: The hold-singer's signet. The hymn it bound is gone, but the air still hums.

bellwards_iron_band.name: Bellward's Iron Band
bellwards_iron_band.flavor: The Hollow Bellward wore it on his ringing arm. It still wants to ring.

pall_touched_ring.name: Pall-Touched Ring
pall_touched_ring.flavor: A ring the Pall tasted and dropped. Hits read the wearer's name and forget it.
